region.label: Region Definition
region.description: Spatial and temporal parameters for the query. Every processing request requires at minimum a polygon or resource list.

timeouts.label: Timeout Controls
timeouts.description: Server-side timeout parameters. Increase for large requests spanning many granules.

resources.label: Resource Controls
resources.description: Controls for granule discovery and processing limits.

output_config.label: Output Configuration
output_config.description: Controls the format and content of the response.

raster_sampling.label: Raster Co-Sampling
raster_sampling.description: Sample external raster datasets at each output point. This is a core parameter available to all processing APIs.
